title: Senior Executive/Executive, Underwriting
description:
This is a perfect gateway into the highly niche sector of non-life re/insurance, part of Singapore's bustling financial services sector. As a wholly-owned entity of the world-renowned Mitsui Sumitomo Insurance (MSI) Group, we are dedicated to developing young talents for our sector.

As a member of our operations team, you can look forward to career development, professional training, a friendly and collaborative culture and a competitive compensation package.

Responsibilities

  • Support our Underwriting teams to underwrite Non-Marine (Property, Construction, Energy, Engineering and Liability) insurance policies/covers for large and complex commercial risks in Singapore and other Middle East/APAC territories; it is expected that Senior Executive will be able to underwrite independently
  • Contribute to managing and developing an agreed portfolio of accounts,
  • Support the underwriting work for allocated cases in line with the agreed processes with the necessary senior direction and support and in accordance with the Company’s capacity and risk appetite
  • Provide error-free documentation to the assigned Underwriting team
  • Ensure transactions are processed within the agreed timeframe
  • Ensure compliance with all laws, regulations, and guidelines, including internal policies, rules and procedures
  • Develop own skills/knowledge in the functional area with the aim of enhancing the quality of work and achievement of KPIs

Requirements

  • At least 3 years' experience in supporting non-life re/insurance underwriting
  • min Diploma holder with SCI qualifications/Membership of Chartered Insurance Institute (UK) or equivalent
  • Compensation, job title, responsibilities and underwriting line will be commensurate with the candidate’s experience level; salary range stated in this job posting is meant as a guide only
  • Knowledge/understanding of the risks underwritten in corporate/commercial segment
  • Knowledge of commercial insurance underwriting process and market practices
  • Understanding of reinsurance concept and practices
  • Ability to understand/ interpret insurance conditions, clauses and warranties


We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. We may retain your personal data for as long as it is necessary to fulfil the purposes for which they were collected, or as required or permitted by applicable laws. Should you disagree, please contact our Data Protection Officer <DPO@msfirstcapital.com.sg> for more information on the retention and disposal of your personal data.

postedCompany.description:
MS First Capital Insurance Limited (MSFCIL) was incorporated in Singapore on 9 December 1950 and has been writing non-life insurance business for more than 72 Years. Since 28th December 2017, the Company is part of Mitsui Sumitomo Insurance Company Limited, a member of MS&AD Group.

We write both personal and commercial lines of non-life insurance business across various classes such as Fire, Engineering, Marine Hull, Marine Cargo, Bond, Professional Indemnity, Motor, Public Liability, Worker's Compensation, Personal Accident and other Miscellaneous Accident.

A. M. Best Company (USA) has affirmed our financial strength rating of 'A (Excellent)' with 'Stable' outlook.

We are incredibly proud to share that MS First Capital Insurance Ltd is recognised among Singapore's Top 300 Employers in the inaugural 2025 Singapore Opportunity Index (SOI). This milestone reflects our ongoing commitment to creating meaningful career pathways, fostering inclusive growth, and investing in our people's potential. The SOI is a data-driven tool developed by The Burning Glass Institute to measure how career development and opportunities unfold within organizations in Singapore. The SOI uses government data to analyze metrics such as pay, progression, gender parity, retention, and hiring across around 1,500 firms, covering nearly 45% of the resident workforce.

Learn more: www.SingaporeOpportunityIndex.sg
postedCompany.name: MS FIRST CAPITAL INSURANCE LIMITED

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
